missing_main_functions.description: No test coverage for user-initiated account deletion or deactivation, which may interact with verification status and data retention policies.
No test coverage for rate limiting on registration, verification resend, or password reset endpoints, which is critical for security and mentioned in assumptions.
No test coverage for the scenario where a verified user wants to change their email address, which would require re-verification and token handling.

missing_sub_functions.description: No sub-function to test rate limiting on the registration endpoint to prevent abuse.
No sub-function to test the scenario where the token expires while the user is on the verification page (e.g., after a long delay before clicking the link).
No sub-function to test rate limiting on the resend verification email endpoint.
No sub-function to test rate limiting on login attempts for unverified users.
No sub-function to test behavior when the purge job fails (e.g., database connection error) and how it retries or logs.
No sub-function to test that password reset tokens expire after a defined period (not specified but implied by security).

duplicate_functions.description: Both SUB006 (Error Handling and Security) and SUB010 (Initial Verification Email Sending) include test categories for email delivery failure handling. Consider consolidating into a single sub-function for email sending error handling.

unclear_categories.description: The test intent mentions 'generic error message' but does not specify whether the error message should be the same as for duplicate email to prevent enumeration. This could be clarified.
The test intent does not specify the exact error message or behavior (e.g., redirect to verification page, show a specific message). This is an open question in the requirements.
The test intent does not specify whether the password reset token should be single-use and expire, which is implied by security best practices but not explicitly stated in requirements.

recommendations: Add a main function for Rate Limiting / Throttling to cover all endpoints (registration, verification resend, login, password reset).
Add a main function for Account Deletion to cover user-initiated removal and its interaction with verification status.
Add a main function for Email Change to cover re-verification flow.
Consolidate duplicate email delivery failure test categories from SUB006 and SUB010 into a single sub-function for email sending error handling.
Clarify the exact error message and behavior for login attempts by unverified users (CAT021) as this is an open question.
Add sub-functions for token expiry during the verification process and for purge job error handling.
Consider adding test categories for concurrent access scenarios beyond registration (e.g., concurrent verification and resend).
Ensure that all test categories for error messages specify whether the message should be generic and consistent to prevent information disclosure.
